title: Tall Masted Ship That Has Been Stranded
sourceTitle: Tall Masted Ship That Has Been Stranded
prompt: A tall masted ship that has been stranded in the sands of the Namibian desert, the ocean receded into the distance, its sails and wood rotting away --ar 3:4 --v 8.1
originalPrompt: A tall masted ship that has been stranded in the sands of the Namibian desert, the ocean receded into the distance, its sails and wood rotting away --ar 3:4 --v 8.1

promptTranslations.zh: 一艘被困在纳米比亚沙漠沙丘里的高桅船，远方海洋已退去，船帆和木质结构正在腐烂 --ar 3:4 --v 8.1
promptTranslations.fr: Un grand voilier à haut mât échoué dans les sables du désert de Namibie, l’océan s’étant retiré au loin, ses voiles et son bois pourrissant --ar 3:4 --v 8.1
promptTranslations.ru: Высокоштоковый корабль, выброшенный на пески Намибийской пустыни, океан на заднем плане, его паруса и деревянные части гниют --ar 3:4 --v 8.1
promptTranslations.pt:

A tall masted ship that has been stranded in the sands of the Namibian desert, the ocean receded into the distance, its sails and wood rotting away --ar 3:4 --v 8.1
promptTranslations.ja: ナミブ砂漠の砂の中に座礁した高いマストの帆船。遠くに海が後退していて、帆と木材は朽ちている。--ar 3:4 --v 8.1
promptTranslations.ko: 나미비아 사막 모래 위에 좌초된 큰 돛대 배, 바다는 멀리 물러나고 돛과 나무는 썩어 가고 있습니다 --ar 3:4 --v 8.1
